title: T-026 — UI: Technicians List + Detail + Skill Edit modal (MNT-028, MNT-029, MNT-M-09) — GDPR PII
prompt:
# T-026 — Technicians pages + skill edit modal

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-028, MNT-029, §10.4 MNT-M-09, §14.4 (GDPR pseudonymise), §4 RBAC
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:689-727
Prototypes: other-screens.jsx:266-486 (technicians_list_page, technician_detail_page); modals.jsx:621-657 (technician_skill_edit_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/technicians` (List + Skills Matrix view toggle) and `/maintenance/technicians/[id]` (Profile + Assignment History). PII (hourly_rate, full certifications) gated server-side per §14.4 GDPR data minimization.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/page.tsx` — RSC; URL `?view=list|matrix`. Skills Matrix is technicians × technician_skills grid; matrix cells colored by level (specialist/has/none). RBAC: hourly_rate column EXCLUDED from SELECT for non-manager (server-side query filter, not just hidden column).
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/[id]/page.tsx` — Profile + Assignment History tabs. GDPR notice Alert. Hourly_rate field excluded server-side for non-manager.
3. Skill Edit modal: useFieldArray for certifications rows + S3 presigned upload per row (cert scan); skill_level RadioGroup basic/advanced/specialist; calls upsert Server Action with `mnt.mwo.assign`-tier RBAC (manager).
4. Cert expiry DueCell: Tailwind text-red-600/text-amber-600 based on days_until_expiry computed server-side; cron alert 30d before expiry deferred to T-009 follow-up (out of scope here).
5. PDF Skills Matrix export button: stub per BL-MAINT-05 (renders "Coming soon" toast). Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n.

## Prototype parity
- List + Skills Matrix view toggle — RTL snapshot other-screens.jsx:266-374.
- Detail header avatar + 2-tab — snapshot other-screens.jsx:376-486.
- Skill Edit modal certifications useFieldArray + S3 upload per row — snapshot modals.jsx:621-657.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/_components/technicians-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/_components/skills-matrix.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/_components/technician-skill-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians/_components/__tests__/technicians.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list renders for non-manager, when source HTML inspected, then no hourly_rate value appears anywhere (server-side query excluded the field).
2. Given list renders for manager, when compared to other-screens.jsx:266-374, then list table + Skills Matrix toggle + cert expiry DueCell colors match by RTL parity checklist.
3. Given detail renders for non-manager viewing another technician, when DOM inspected, then no hourly_rate value present (§14.4 personal data minimization).
4. Given Skill Edit submitted with manager session, when settled, then technician_skills + tech_certifications rows upserted; non-manager session is rejected server-side.
5. Given a user_id is GDPR-erased (T-013 eraseMaintenanceUser), when /maintenance/technicians renders for that user, then certifications=NULL, hourly_rate=NULL, user_id=hash and the GDPR notice banner is shown.
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + RBAC + GDPR tests; Playwright e2e for skill edit.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/technicians`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not include hourly_rate in SELECT for non-manager — exclude in Drizzle query (not just CSS hide).
- Do not allow operator session to open Skill Edit (RBAC server-side).
- Do not leak PII (certifications full text) to non-manager session.
- Do not export PDF with cert scans — BL-MAINT-05 stub only.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.

pipeline_inputs.description: Technicians List + Detail + Skill Edit modal. GDPR PII minimization server-side. PDF skills export stub (BL-MAINT-05).
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-side query excludes hourly_rate for non-manager — never rely on CSS hide. GDPR-erased users render placeholder per T-013. UI closeout includes Playwright artifacts.
out_of_scope: PDF skills export with scans (BL-MAINT-05 P2)

Given list renders for non-manager, when source HTML inspected, then no hourly_rate value appears anywhere (server-side query excluded per §14.4 GDPR data minimization)
